amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 13 — paragraph 3 — point e a (new)
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 13 — paragraph 3 — point e a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission



(ea)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

(ea) a description of the mechanisms included within the AI system that allows users to properly collect, store and interpret the logs in accordance with Article 12(1).

a description of the mechanisms included within the AI system that allows users to properly collect, store and interpret the logs in accordance with Article 12(1).
